diagnostic.help: connect ports that declare the same color
diagnostic.message: wire port colors differ: source.(pulse_out) carries 'pulse' but sink.(pulse_in) carries 'alert'

source.text:
composition wired_pulse_type_mismatch

use "pulse_source.petrinet" as source
use "pulse_sink_alert.petrinet" as sink
wire source.(pulse_out) -> sink.(pulse_in)
